# GodeX Wiki

> Complete documentation for GodeX — an OpenAI-compatible Responses API gateway that makes every LLM model a Codex engine.

## Onboarding

- [Contributor Guide](onboarding/contributor/contributor-guide.md) — For new contributors with TypeScript proficiency
- [Staff Engineer Guide](onboarding/staff-engineer/staff-engineer-guide.md) — Dense architectural guide for senior engineers
- [Executive Guide](onboarding/executive/executive-guide.md) — For VP/director-level engineering leaders
- [Product Manager Guide](onboarding/product-manager/product-manager-guide.md) — For PMs and non-engineering stakeholders

## Getting Started

- [Overview](01-getting-started/overview.md) — What GodeX is, why it exists, core value proposition
- [Quick Start](01-getting-started/quick-start.md) — Install, configure, and run in 5 minutes
- [CLI Reference](01-getting-started/cli-reference.md) — All commands, flags, and environment variables

## Deep Dive

- [Architecture](02-architecture/architecture.md) — System layers, request flow, and module responsibilities
- [Bridge Kernel](03-bridge-kernel/bridge-kernel.md) — The Responses-to-Chat translation core
- [Provider Development](04-provider-development/provider-development.md) — How to add a new LLM provider
- [Streaming Pipeline](05-streaming-pipeline/streaming-pipeline.md) — Transform chain and stream state machine
- [Session Management](06-session-management/session-management.md) — Conversation chains and session stores
- [Configuration](07-configuration/configuration.md) — godex.yaml schema, env interpolation, defaults
- [Trace & Observability](08-trace-observability/trace-observability.md) — Async SQLite tracing system
- [Error Handling](09-error-handling/error-handling.md) — GodeXError hierarchy and domain codes

## Optional

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md) — Wiki build and development instructions
- [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt) — Full inline documentation for LLM consumption
